zh.lifeSummary: 當Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGU於1196年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可斯時，她的父親Alexandre de Bourgogne27歲，母親Béatrix de Rion21歲。她於1210年與André de MONTBARD III在法國布格o-達艾波希斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1245年在法國布格o-達艾波希斯享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGU于1196年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可斯时，她的父亲Alexandre de Bourgogne27岁，母亲Béatrix de Rion21岁。她于1210年与André de MONTBARD III在法国布格o-達艾波希斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1245年在法国布格o-達艾波希斯享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BOURGOGNE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: MONTAGU
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Huguette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGU was born in 1196, in Creuse, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Alexandre de Bourgogne, was 27 and her mother, Béatrix de Rion, was 21. She married André de MONTBARD III in 1210, in Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1245, in Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGU est née en 1196, à Creuse, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Alexandre de Bourgogne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Béatrix de Rion, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé André de MONTBARD III en 1210, à Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1245, à Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGU 1196 in Creuse, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexandre de Bourgogne 27 und ihre Mutter Béatrix de Rion 21. Sie hat 1210 in Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich André de MONTBARD III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1245 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGU è nata il nel 1196 nel Creuse, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Alexandre de Bourgogne, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Béatrix de Rion, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato André de MONTBARD III nel 1210, nel Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1245, nel Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGUが1196年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインクレウゼで生まれた時，父Alexandre de Bourgogneは27歳，母Béatrix de Rionは21歳であった。1210年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルeプオイセスでAndré de MONTBARD IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1245年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルeプオイセスで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGU(이)가 1196년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 크레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexandre de Bourgogne(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrix de Rion(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1210년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 e포이세스에서 André de MONTBARD III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 e포이세스에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGU nasceu em 1196, em Creuse, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Alexandre de Bourgogne, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix de Rion, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com André de MONTBARD III em 1210, em Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1245, em Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGU родилась в 1196 г. в местности креус, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Alexandre de Bourgogne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrix de Rion, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени André de MONTBARD III в 1210 г. в местности eпоиссесь, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1245 г. в местности eпоиссесь, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Huguette de BOURGOGNE - MONTAGU nació en 1196, en Creuse, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Alexandre de Bourgogne, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Béatrix de Rion, tenía 21 años. Se casó con André de MONTBARD III en 1210, en Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1245, en Époisses, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 49 años.
